    • cs9 — project framework
    • csalert — surveillance alerts
    • csdata — structural data
    • csdb — database access
    • csmaps — maps of Norway
    • csstyle — output styling
    • cstidy — tidy surveillance data
    • cstime — weeks & dates
    • csutil — shared utilities
    • Package registry

R package · List utilities

Base-R list utilities.

Utility functions for common base-R problems with lists — characterise list types, split lists into equal groups, and unnest data frames within named lists.

Get started Browse the reference →

Overview

csutil contains helpful functions to help with common base-R problems.

Read the introduction vignette here or run help(package="csutil").
